tools.name: lp.change.new
tools.description: Create a deterministic lp.change_request artifact.

tools.name: lp.change.validate
tools.description: Validate a lp.change_request instance JSON.

tools.name: lp.deploy.accept
tools.description: Accept a pack and emit run, decision, and deployment execution artifacts.

tools.name: lp.deploy.run
tools.description: Execute a local deployment plan and persist routing and decision state.

tools.name: lp.deploy.status
tools.description: Get the current status of a deployment execution.

tools.name: lp.deploy.query
tools.description: Query deployment history by deployment id or latest app/environment target.

tools.name: lp.deploy.stop
tools.description: Stop a deployment deterministically and record the final decision.

tools.name: lp.deploy.rollback
tools.description: Rollback a deployment deterministically and record the final decision.

tools.name: lp.device.release.create
tools.description: Create a deterministic device release plan from a store provider profile, a sealed device package manifest, and the machine-readable x07-wasm package report, with optional metrics-gate bootstrap inputs.

tools.name: lp.device.release.validate
tools.description: Validate a device release plan against the selected provider capability matrix before execution.

tools.name: lp.device.release.run
tools.description: Execute a device release plan through the selected store adapter and persist release execution state.

tools.name: lp.device.release.query
tools.description: Query device release execution state by release id or latest filtered selection, including latest metrics and linked incidents in full view.

tools.name: lp.device.release.observe
tools.description: Advance one device release observability cycle, normalize fresh telemetry, and persist any resulting metrics-gate decision.

tools.name: lp.device.release.pause
tools.description: Pause an in-progress device release and emit a signed manual control action record.

tools.name: lp.device.release.resume
tools.description: Resume a paused device release and emit a signed manual control action record.

tools.name: lp.device.release.halt
tools.description: Halt a device release without promoting it further and persist the manual control trail.

tools.name: lp.device.release.stop
tools.description: Stop automatic device release observation without changing the current provider rollout state and persist the manual control trail.

tools.name: lp.device.release.complete
tools.description: Complete a device release rollout and emit a signed manual control action record.

tools.name: lp.device.release.rerun
tools.description: Create a new device release execution from an existing release execution, optionally restarting from a later step index.

tools.name: lp.device.release.rollback
tools.description: Roll back a device release to the previous store version and emit a signed manual control action record.

tools.name: lp.incident.list
tools.description: List incidents from the local platform state, optionally filtered by deployment or app/environment.

tools.name: lp.incident.get
tools.description: Get one incident bundle detail by incident_id.

tools.name: lp.device.incident.list
tools.description: List device incidents linked to a release execution, optionally filtered by release_exec_id or app/environment.

tools.name: lp.device.incident.get
tools.description: Get one device incident bundle detail by incident_id.

tools.name: lp.incident.capture
tools.description: Capture a platform incident and persist lp.incident.bundle artifacts from explicit request/response/trace evidence or control/runtime context.

tools.name: lp.regress.from_incident
tools.description: Generate regression fixtures from a captured incident using the regression adapter.

tools.name: lp.app.list
tools.description: List apps/environments with their latest deployment, incident, and kill-switch summary.

tools.name: lp.deploy.pause
tools.description: Pause a deployment at the next deterministic boundary and emit a signed manual control decision.

tools.name: lp.deploy.rerun
tools.description: Create a new deployment execution as a rerun of a prior deployment, optionally from a specific step index.

tools.name: lp.app.kill
tools.description: Latch the app-level kill switch and stop serving all active executions for one app/environment.

tools.name: lp.app.unkill
tools.description: Clear the app-level kill latch for one app/environment and emit a signed control decision.

tools.name: lp.platform.kill
tools.description: Latch the global platform kill switch and stop serving all active executions.

tools.name: lp.platform.unkill
tools.description: Clear the global platform kill latch and emit a signed control decision.
